text.title: Edge Case Checklist — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the per-screen resolution-record shape. Designer or supporting agent must satisfy this before handoff or AC commitment.

forbidden.pattern: any item with resolution=null or evidence_link_or_copy_or_reason=null
resolution=n/a-with-reason where the reason does not reference product_in_scope_list OR a product-specific characteristic (per r4)
copy-rule-only item with copy text matching /lorem ipsum|TBD|see Figma|TODO/
state-rendered item with evidence_link unreachable or pointing to deleted Figma node
error / empty resolution with copy that includes raw HTTP codes / stack traces / debugging info (user-visible)
product_in_scope_list missing — every project MUST declare its in-scope edge cases up front

allowed-transformations.transformation: Group multiple edge items that share a single copy rule (e.g., empty and empty-after-search share illustration) but record both items separately.
Reference an existing pattern from the product's edge-case library if an identical resolution applies elsewhere ("uses copy-pattern P-007").
Mark items as n/a-with-reason via product_in_scope_list if the project doesn't support that case (e.g., RTL).

list.item: All 12 items have resolution + evidence/copy/reason populated (r1, r2)
Copy strings are real text, not placeholder (r3)
N/A reasons trace back to product_in_scope_list (r4)
Error / empty copy does not leak technical details to users (f6)
Cross-screen audit performed if 2+ similar screens shipped in this batch
